## TRM1.4. Vertical flight efficiency of the descent (PI#7)

Compared to the overall RP5 average value (149.2 seconds per flight), average times flown level during descent are on average 11.4 seconds per flight lower in Austria. The highest average time flown level during descent happens at Innsbruck Airport (LOWI) (262.6 seconds per flight), while the lowest happens at Vienna International Airport (LOWW) (115.6 seconds per flight).
